title: Dekton 9-Inch Spirit Level with Strong Magnetic Base, 45-Degree Vial, Horizontal and Vertical Vials, Hanging Hole, Durable Polystyrene Construction – Ideal for Precision Leveling and Alignment Tasks
features: Accurate Leveling: The Dekton 9-inch spirit level features a strong magnetic base that securely attaches to metal surfaces, providing reliable and accurate leveling for various projects. Its 45-degree vial allows for precise angle measurements, making it ideal for both professional and DIY applications.

Durable Construction: Molded from high-quality polystyrene, this spirit level is designed to withstand tough conditions. The steel milled edges enhance durability and improve accuracy, ensuring that the level maintains its precision over time, even in demanding environments.

Versatile Usage: This spirit level is perfect for a wide range of tasks, from hanging shelves and cabinets to aligning tiles and frames. Its horizontal and vertical vials make it versatile for different leveling needs, while the compact size makes it easy to handle and store.

Convenient Design: The hanging hole allows for easy storage when not in use, while the lightweight design makes it portable. Whether you're a professional contractor or a DIY enthusiast, this spirit level is an essential tool for ensuring everything is perfectly aligned.

Easy to Read: The bright, clear vials are easy to read, even in low light conditions, ensuring you can work efficiently. The combination of durability, accuracy, and user-friendly features makes this spirit level a must-have for any toolbox.
description: The Dekton 9-inch spirit level is an essential tool for anyone seeking precision in their projects. Constructed from durable polystyrene and featuring steel milled edges, this spirit level is built to withstand tough conditions while maintaining accuracy. Its strong magnetic base allows it to securely attach to metal surfaces, making it ideal for a variety of applications, from hanging shelves and cabinets to aligning tiles and frames. The spirit level includes horizontal and vertical vials for versatile usage, while the 45-degree vial provides added functionality for angle measurements. With a convenient hanging hole for easy storage and a lightweight design for portability, this level is perfect for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts. The bright, clear vials ensure readability, even in low light, allowing you to work efficiently. Trust the Dekton spirit level for reliable performance, ensuring every project is perfectly aligned and finished to a high standard. It's the perfect addition to any toolbox, combining durability and accuracy.
